item.title: AFL facing major fixturing headache in 2027 due to Australia’s Test against England at MCG
item.description: The league is now considering a range of options, including delaying the start to the 2027 season.

item.title: Aussie Olympic champion Matthew Mitcham spills on nude scenes in new stage performance in Australia
item.description: The gold medallist strips off as he takes to the stage in his first major role on Australian soil.

item.title: Harry and Meghan comfort cancer patients in Jordan
item.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex also spoke with recovering addicts.

item.title: Character references to be scrapped in Victorian courts for crimes including rape and assault
item.description: ‘As if being a ‘good bloke’ cancels out the violence you perpetrate.’

item.title: Federal Court in Darwin orders $54m compensation over cultural damage from McArthur River Mine
item.description: After years in court, Glencore’s mine was found to have permanently damaged sacred sites and cultural connections to Country.

item.title: Better Homes and Gardens host Johanna Griggs reveals secret to the show’s success and why it’s still her dream job
item.description: The former champion swimmer spoke openly about her 22 years fronting the show.

item.title: Why Princess Catherine refused to sign an autograph while visiting Powys in Wales
item.description: She told the man she ‘can’t sign things,’ but can shake his hand.

item.title: Supporters call for review of conviction of political killing mastermind Phuong Ngo who was jailed 30 years ago
item.description: Supporters are fighting to release Phuong Ngo, arguing he’s spent decades in jail for a crime he says he never committed.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Ajla Tomljanovic loses quarter-final against Kimberly Birrell after ‘terrible scheduling situation’
item.description: ‘This shouldn’t be allowed.’

item.title: 600-million-year-old Australian fossil site tipped for World Heritage listing
item.description: A 58,000-hectare Australian expanse containing some of the world's oldest evidence of animal life could be included on the prestigious list.

item.title: Legendary Australian racehorse Makybe Diva dies aged 26
item.description: The three-time Melbourne Cup winner is being farewelled after a short battle.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Telcos switching off tens of thousands of phones due to Triple-0 crisis. What to do if you’re affected
item.description: Here’s what you can do if you’re affected.

item.title: Former AFL player Jayden Hunt playing golf every day in bid to achieve PGA Tour dream
item.description: ‘I’m actually more sore now than I have been ever in my footy career, which is crazy.’

item.title: Townsville Fire win WNBL title in dramatic OT stunner away from home against Perth Lynx
item.description: Inspirational skipper Courtney Woods starred despite needing glue surgery after a blow to the head.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Gerry Thornton retraces steps that exposed Louis Mahony’s murder of Lainie Coldwell
item.description: ‘It just looked staged to me.’

item.title: Delta Goodrem announced as Australia’s representative for the 70th Eurovision Song Contest
item.description: ‘I am so honoured to be representing Australia on one of the biggest music stages in the world.’

item.title: Lachie Neale marriage drama: Jules Neale rips into Brisbane Lions ex-husband in viral video
item.description: The former Brisbane Lions captain’s ex, Jules Neale, has been dropping hints for months, but this brutal video takes aim directly at Lachie.

item.title: 2026 Actor Awards: Highlights from the ceremony in Los Angeles as celebrities honoured with emotional tributes
item.description: Here is a full list of the winners.

item.title: Australian billionaire Adrian Portelli reports feeling safer surrounded by missile threats in Dubai than Melbourne
item.description: The high-profile entrepreneur said he’s more worried about food stains than missiles.

item.title: Legendary jockey Pat Hyland dies surrounded by family: ‘Deeply loved to the end’
item.description: The champion became an icon when he achieved one of Australian racing’s most famous feats in front of Prince Charles and Princess Diana.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Huge plumes of smoke over Beirut as US urges citizens to flee Middle East
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news out of the Middle East as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Aussie Test star Alex Carey welcomes the prospect of privatisation within the BBL: ‘It should happen’
item.description: ‘That just makes sense to me. If it’s good for everyone, then let’s get it going.’

item.title: Aussie cricket great Stuart MacGill explodes at podcast co-host: ‘You are a moron’
item.description: The former cricketer was about to ‘jump across the mic’ before the show ended abruptly.

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter Summer claims patron poured water over her for dancing at Ed Sheeran concert
item.description: ‘God forbid I stand up at a concert’.

item.title: Mike Smithson: Inside the escalating fight for SA’s undecided voters ahead of election
item.description: There is only 18 days left to campaign for the 2026 SA election as regional seats take a key focus.

item.title: Cricket star Travis Head tears to shreds public narrative on Australia’s failed T20 World Cup campaign
item.description: Experts and fans were all saying the same thing, but Travis Head has called it nonsense.

item.title: Jackie O’s KIIS FM contract terminated after feud with co-host Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Kyle Sandilands has been suspended for 14 days as his on-air behaviour comes under scrutiny.

item.title: ‘I would walk’: Resurfaced video reveals Jackie O’s early desire to quit show with Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Explosive footage of Jackie O Henderson revealing early signs that she could walk from her $100 million contract has resurfaced. WATCH THE VIDEO

item.title: ATP Challenger tennis players race off court at Fujairah Open after nearby explosions: ‘Get inside’
item.description: Players ‘heard the sounds of jets’ and quickly realised it was ‘not very safe’, as officials plotted escape routes out of the country.

item.title: Home and Away: Iconic WA filming locations revealed for their upcoming episodes filmed in the West
item.description: All the locations revealed: Brax (Stephen Peacocke) and Ricky (Bonnie Sveen) make their highly anticipated return to Home and Away 7.00pm Monday, March 9.

item.title: Aussie heavyweight Justis Huni announces boxing comeback after tragic death of trainer Keri Fui
item.description: The 26-year-old has been sidelined since his trainer suffered a heart attack during their workout and later died.

item.title: Ukrainian Igor Komarav reportedly killed after alleged kidnapping in Bali as dismembered remains found
item.description: The 28-year-old was holidaying with his girlfriend when he was allegedly snatched off the street.

item.title: Former world No.1 Jon Rahm levels damning ‘extortion’ accusation at European Tour
item.description: The two-time major champion has put forward a compromise but the fight looks set to rumble on.

item.title: Small business owners worry work-from-home laws will ‘create divide’ between workers
item.description: ‘Admin staff have the ... right to work from home but the blue-collar workers will have to come in.’

item.title: Labor maintains strong lead as One Nation surges in latest SA polling numbers
item.description: The Roy Morgan poll shows that South Australians are set to re-elect Premier Peter Malinauskas and the Labor Government with an increased majority.

item.title: Aldi lunchbox snack Bubble Bars recalled nationally after black rubber found in rice crispy treats
item.description: Eating the recalled snacks could cause illness or injury, Food Standards Australia said.

item.title: ‘Time is up’: Mounting calls for Medicare rebate to cover longer GP visits which are ‘essential’ for complex care
item.description: Peak health bodies believe the current rebate system unfairly punishes patients with complex needs.

item.title: Australians living with macular degeneration fearful of proposed Medicare change
item.description: ‘If you don’t have treatment, you end up going blind.’

item.title: Legendary broadcaster Bruce McAvaney pays heartbreaking tribute to great friend and ‘ultimate teammate’ Dennis Cometti
item.description: ‘I’ve lost something very precious.’

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Dozens dead as US torpedo hits Iranian warship in Indian Ocean off coast of Sri Lanka
item.description: It marks the first sinking of an enemy vessel by a torpedo since World War II.

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Khamenei's son Mojtaba seen as possible next Iranian Supreme Leader
item.description: The mid-ranking cleric has long been considered a contender to become the country's next paramount ruler.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: Slain leader Khamenei’s laid to rest in holy Mashhad after state funeral
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Finn Allen shatters records to spank South Africa and send New Zealand into T20 World Cup final
item.description: One of the all-time greats could not believe what he was seeing, while the ‘pure carnage’ left fans spinning.

item.title: Wedding bells ring for Australian favourites Noemie Fox and tennis champion Aryna Sabalenka
item.description: The ‘magical’ scenes have given sporting legends from the around the world ‘goosebumps’.

item.title: Valtteri Bottas lives up to status as ‘honorary Aussie’ with surprise meat raffle appearance
item.description: ‘We’ve claimed him as one of our own.’

item.title: Age restrictions loom as e-bike and e-scooter safety recommendations handed down to Queensland government
item.description: Children under 16 are the main target of recommended reforms.

item.title: Photo gallery: All the best looks from the Melbourne Grand Prix’s Glamour on the Grid event
item.description: Jules Neale, AFL stars, and high-profile models have made an eye-catching appearance at the celebrity event.

item.title: Former Socceroos boss Graham Arnold stranded in UAE ahead of crucial World Cup play-off
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East could have major implications on football’s showpiece event this year.

item.title: Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll risk ‘permanent nerve damage’ as Aston Martin boss concedes they won’t finish Aus GP
item.description: The team boss has made a staggering admission days out from the season-opening race.

item.description: Our expert commentators and award-winning journos are dropping bombs ahead of the AFL season.

item.title: Outback floods: Inland sea cuts off communities as floodwaters cover large parts of central west Queensland
item.description: ‘Road access in and out of these communities is going to take some time to be restored.’

item.title: Heartbroken families share details of US soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description: Nicole Amor was one of six US service members lost in the first days of the conflict.

item.title: Spiritual retreat operator charged with manslaughter over death of Jarrad Antonovich after psychedelics, frog poison
item.description: The 45-year-old died in October after consuming a plant-based psychedelic and frog-based poison.

item.title: Free parking at popular Sydney beaches under threat as Randwick City Council proposes paid access
item.description: ‘It’s only fair that people who visit our beaches also contribute to the cost of maintaining them.’

item.title: Deadline looms for Robodebt victims with registrations closing on March 6
item.description: There is just hours left to register. Here is everything you need to know.

item.title: Police lay criminal neglect charge against mother after baby dies in Adelaide’s north
item.description: It is understood the little boy was left in a vehicle.

item.title: Coalition not scrapping $10k tradie bonus scheme, despite it being ‘inflationary’ and not ‘the answer’
item.description: This is despite the Shadow Minister for Skills calling the scheme ‘inflationary’, ‘wrong’ and ‘not the answer’.

item.title: Punch the orphan macaque is outgrowing his plushie at Japan zoo
item.description: Zookeepers are hoping the monkey who has garnered international attention is making progress with his society.

item.title: Supercars star Brodie Kostecki vomits his way to Albert Park pole and victory: ‘Had better days’
item.description: The former champion threw up all over himself in the car but still couldn’t be stopped.

item.title: Qantas replaces travel-style safety video with stripped-back briefing
item.description: Passengers get a rare behind-the-scenes view and a new alert following recent safety concerns.

item.title: Middle East conflict threatens Australian food security as fertiliser supplies choke
item.description: Farmers are sounding the alarm on a crisis that could see food prices skyrocket or worse - empty shelves.

item.title: Spine-tingling scenes as SCG stands as one to remember Bondi victims and honour heroes before AFL season opener
item.description: The biggest cheer was reserved for the last person to step out onto the ground.

item.description: The late legend’s greatest commentary moments punctuated the lead-up to the season opener.

item.description: A gust of wind sent the trolley hurtling across the Bunnings carpark, slamming into a SUV.

item.description: The party is projected to win at least one upper house seat in the March election.

item.description: The women changed tack to sing and salute before the high-profile match.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: Slain leader Khamenei’s laid to rest in holy Mashhad after state funeral
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands considers legal action against ARN over potential sacking after split with Jackie ‘O’ Henderson
item.description: The host is facing accusations of serious misconduct as his longtime partnership with Jackie O ends.

item.title: Twist in mystery exchange between Oliver Florent and Callum Mills following Sydney-Carlton clash
item.description: The rollercoaster fallout from the Sydney-Carlton clash has had a very interesting postscript.

item.title: Donald Trump fires Kristi Noem as homeland security secretary following drama-filled immigration crackdown
item.description: A White House official said the dumping was the result of ‘many unfortunate leadership failures’.

item.title: NRL superstar Nathan Cleary dealing with kitchen disaster on eve of blockbuster clash with the Broncos
item.description: The nightmare situation has severely disrupted the champ’s preparation for his season-opener.

item.title: Britney Spears arrested in California on DUI charges
item.description: ‘Hopefully she can get the help and support she needs during this difficult time.’

item.title: AFL star Jacob Weitering admits poor discipline cost Carlton during Sydney Swans rampage
item.description: The veteran defender refused to shy away from the truth when the burning question came.

item.title: Craig Bellamy hoses down comparisons between Storm skipper Harry Grant and club great Cameron Smith
item.description: Television commentary is fuelling the comparison but the master coach is having none of it.

item.title: Ford Bronco firms for Australia as CEO doubles down on ‘Porsche of off-road’
item.description: Ford has restated its goal to become the king of off-road performance, which would require its hero SUV to be sold in markets like Australia.

item.title: James Packer confirms engagement to girlfriend Kylie Lim
item.description: It will be the third marriage for the Aussie billionaire.

item.title: Sam Kerr makes huge Mary Fowler prediction after drought-breaking Matildas goal against Iran
item.description: ‘She has got age on her side.’

item.title: Grave fears emerge for Iranian players after Asian Cup clash with Matildas: ‘Imminent danger’
item.description: A journalist has sounded the alarm and says the team is facing ‘arbitrary detention and execution’.

item.title: Audi Australia open to PHEV, performance powertrains for new Q3
item.description: There's a plug-in hybrid Q3 available overseas, and Audi Australia is open to the possibility of bringing it to local showrooms.

item.title: 2026 BMW i3 teased and confirmed for reveal on March 18
item.description: BMW’s first Neue Klasse sedan will debut a new-generation 3 Series design and is set to offer more than 800km of range.

item.title: Heartfelt tributes for Filipino student Karlo Bul-Anon after drowning off Main Beach on the Gold Coast
item.description: ‘He drowned, and just like that, the young man full of dreams and love was taken too soon.’

item.title: Honda Insight reborn as Chinese electric SUV, Australian plans unclear
item.description: Honda has revealed a new mid-size electric SUV for Japan, based on one of its wide range of Chinese-market EVs and wearing the familiar Insight name.

item.title: Penny Wong condemns Israeli minister’s plan to flatten Beirut like Gaza, addresses Aussies stuck in Middle East
item.description: Mass evacuations have been ordered in Lebanon’s capital as Israel targets the city with airstrikes.

item.title: NRL’s Vegas round goes off-Broadway, according US TV ratings analyst
item.description: While league bosses have been thumping chests another ‘miserable’ picture has been painted.

item.title: Ford CEO warns Ranger development may leave Australia without regulation changes
item.description: Ford’s global boss says the Blue Oval's Australian product engineering squad could move overseas unless the government's emissions laws are tweaked.

item.title: Kyle and Jackie O: KIIS FM staff ‘devastated’ by star duo’s shock split
item.description: ‘I wasn’t done. None of us were.’

item.title: Victorian police sued by officer’s son after gunpoint arrest during search of family home
item.description: He was held at gunpoint during search for alleged cop killer Dezi Freeman.

item.title: 2026 Tesla Model Y L: Longer, six-seat electric SUV locked in for Australia
item.description: Tesla Australia has confirmed, to no great surprise, that it'll launch a longer and more practical version of its Model Y with six seats in total.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie reunites with TV colleagues amid search for her missing mother Nancy
item.description: The popular presenter has been on leave since her 84-year-old mother disappeared in a suspected kidnapping.

item.title: Man charged after 69-year-old dies from blunt force trauma in Burpengary home in Queensland
item.description: Police said the two men were known to each other.

item.title: Sam Docherty apologises for expletive-laden attack on Carlton after Opening Round loss to Sydney
item.description: The former Blues captain has torn shreds off his old club in an explosive voice recording.

item.title: ADF helicopter forced to take evasive action after encounter with Chinese navy aircraft over Yellow Sea
item.description: ‘This was an unsafe and unprofessional manoeuvre that posed a risk to our aircraft and its personnel.’

item.title: Jackie ‘O’ Henderson breaks silence after radio split with Kyle Sandilands
item.description: She wanted to make ‘one important point very clear’ after days of misinformation.

item.title: Inquiry into racism, hate and violence against First Nations people follows WA terror attack and antisemitism royal commission
item.description: Here’s what we know about the inquiry.

item.title: Four charged after man allegedly kidnapped and held captive in Adelaide’s northwest
item.description: The man was allegedly held captive and assaulted over three days.

item.title: Elizabeth Downs woman speaks out after trying to save baby trapped in car, mother charged with criminal neglect
item.description: ‘I can’t stop seeing the way he looked.’

item.title: British police arrest four men on suspicion of spying for Iran on Jewish sites
item.description: The men are suspected of spying on locations and individuals.

item.title: McLaren boss Zak Brown addresses Oscar Piastri-Lando Norris ‘conspiracy theory’ from 2025 season
item.description: The team CEO has responded to the ‘allegations’ on the eve of the Australian Grand Prix.

item.title: Bomb squad shuts down Geelong street after explosive device found in Victoria
item.description: Two people are now in custody after bomb disposal experts were called in.

item.title: Petition launched to block murderer Gerard Baden-Clay's parole eligibility next year
item.description: ‘What’s the price then of a woman’s life?’

item.title: Queensland footballer Jacek McLaurin wakes from coma after catastrophic spinal injury
item.description: The 26-year-old has no feeling from his shoulders down and is ‘terrified of what’s to come’.

item.title: Surf lifesaver found after extensive search at Buddina Beach, Sunshine Coast
item.description: ‘When it’s one of our own, it hits home very hard.’
